signals.snippet: I want to cancel my service with Zoca. Effective immedatly

ignored_examples.snippet: Oh my goodness! You’re right I am so sorry that I forgot our meeting at 10 AM

cause_analysis.narrative: Unwind Massage Lounge churned on 2026-03-28 after 130 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 26-day silence starting 2026-02-11. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 19 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2025-12-23 via app_chat, client wrote: "Oh my goodness! You’re right I am so sorry that I forgot our meeting at 10 AM…" — no outbound response in 17 days.
